subject: [PATCH v3 23/28] nfsd: allow encoding a filehandle into fattr4 without a svc_fh

2026-04-28.patch_summary: This patch allows the encoding of a filehandle into fattr4 without requiring a svc_fh. It achieves this by adding a new 'fhandle' field to struct nfsd4_fattr_args and populating it from the svc_fh in CB_NOTIFY callbacks. This is necessary because the current fattr4 encoder requires a svc_fh, which is not available in all scenarios.
